ddls:
CREATE TABLE "terrain_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the terrain data entry */,
  "trType" INTEGER /* Type of terrain (1: mountain, 2: valley, etc.) */,
  "posX" REAL /* X-coordinate of the terrain point */,
  "posY" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the terrain point */,
  "posZ" REAL /* Z-coordinate (elevation) of the terrain point */,
  "slopeXZ" REAL /* Slope in the XZ plane */,
  "slopeYZ" REAL /* Slope in the YZ plane */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographical location */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terrain_data_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terrain_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terrain_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terrain_data_trType FOREIGN KEY ("trType") REFERENCES terrain_types ("trType")
)

CREATE TABLE "terrain_types" (
  "trType" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the terrain type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the terrain type (e.g., mountain, valley) */,
  "description_extended" TEXT /* Extended description of the terrain type */,
  "common_characteristics" TEXT /* Common characteristics associated with the terrain type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trType")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation_min" REAL /* Minimum elevation in the location */,
  "elevation_max" REAL /* Maximum elevation in the location */,
  "terrain_type_ids" TEXT /* Common terrain types found in the location */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey conducted in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the researcher */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "current_project" TEXT /* Current project the researcher is working on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the terrain data entry */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who generated the report */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was conducted */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the analysis performed */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the analysis */,
  "data_source_ids" TEXT /* Data sources used in the analysis */,
  "visualizations" TEXT /* Links or references to visualizations created as part of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES terrain_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "slope_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the slope statistics entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the terrain data entry */,
  "avg_slopeXZ" REAL /* Average slope in the XZ plane */,
  "avg_slopeYZ" REAL /* Average slope in the YZ plane */,
  "max_slopeXZ" REAL /* Maximum slope in the XZ plane */,
  "max_slopeYZ" REAL /* Maximum slope in the YZ plane */,
  "min_slopeXZ" REAL /* Minimum slope in the XZ plane */,
  "min_slopeYZ" REAL /* Minimum slope in the YZ plane */,
  "standard_deviation_slopeXZ" REAL /* Standard deviation of the slope in the XZ plane */,
  "standard_deviation_slopeYZ" REAL /* Standard deviation of the slope in the YZ plane */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_slope_statistics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES terrain_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL for the data source */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Accessibility of the data source (public, private) */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of how data is collected */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used for data collection */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the method */,
  "last_validated" TEXT /* Date when the method was last validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the terrain data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the data */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES terrain_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance activity */,
  "admin_user" TEXT /* Username of the admin performing maintenance */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance action taken */,
  "system_version" TEXT /* Version of the system at the time of maintenance */,
  "affected_modules" TEXT /* Modules affected by the maintenance activity */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_admin_user FOREIGN KEY ("admin_user") REFERENCES users ("username")
)
